buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(56,189,248,0.3)] transition-all duration-300

inputs.search_hero: bg-[#F1F5F9] text-slate-900 placeholder:text-slate-500 border-none shadow-lg h-14 px-8 text-lg focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary/50

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

medical_abstract.usage: Subtle texture for cards or footer

general: Implement the 'Joan' font for all Headings (h1-h6) and the 'Manrope' font for body text.
Ensure the 'Medcures' logo is text-based (Italic, White) if no image is provided, placed on the dark textured background.
The Search Bar in the Hero section MUST be Light Grey (#F1F5F9) with 34px border-radius (rounded-[34px]).
Use the 'Dark Medical' theme: Deep charcoal backgrounds, white text, and subtle blue/teal accents.
Do NOT use gradients for the main background; use the provided image texture with a dark overlay.
For the Chat Interface: Use a Sidebar (Darker) + Main Chat Area (Dark). User bubbles: Primary Color (Blue/Teal). AI bubbles: Glassmorphism (White/5).
Ensure all interactive elements have a 'data-testid' attribute.

layout_specifics.landing_page: Hero section with centered search bar, 'Joan' headline, and the dark abstract background.
layout_specifics.chat_interface: Sidebar for history, Main area for chat. Input area fixed at bottom. Disclaimer popup on first load.
layout_specifics.auth_pages: Simple, centered cards with glassmorphism effect on the dark background.

universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop': No generic centered layouts without tension. Use asymmetry where possible (except the search bar which is requested centered).
Micro-interactions: Add hover states to all buttons and links.
Accessibility: Ensure contrast ratios are met (White text on Dark bg is usually safe, but check blue accents).
